news.title: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25B — here’s where the money is going
news.summary: Tesla's planned capex for 2026 is three times higher than what the company has historically spent. Its CFO said, as a result, Tesla will have a negative free cash flow the rest of the year.

news.title: Google updates Workspace to make AI your new office intern
news.summary: Google has introduced a host of new automated functions into Workspace, all of which are driven by Workspace Intelligence, its new AI system.

news.title: Hands on with X’s new AI-powered custom feeds
news.summary: X's AI-powered custom timelines are replacing Communities, with Grok-curated feeds...and new ad slots.

news.title: How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer
news.summary: Cursor was on track to close a $2 billion funding round this week but chose to halt discussions after SpaceX offered a $10 billion "collaboration fee" and a path to a $60 billion acquisition.

news.title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
news.summary: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.

news.title: Google turns Chrome into an AI co-worker for the workplace
news.summary: Google brings Gemini-powered "auto browse" capabilities to Chrome for enterprise users, letting workers automate tasks like research, data entry, and more.

news.title: Google makes an interesting choice with its new agent-building tool for enterprises
news.summary: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform takes an interesting approach: It is geared for IT and technical users.

news.title: AI Overviews are coming to your Gmail at work
news.summary: The AI Overviews will offer instant summaries pulled from across multiple emails.
